title: Checkbox
description: Accessible checkbox with support for indeterminate state, description and all color and size variants.

description.title: With description
description.desc: Secondary text below the label to clarify the purpose.
description.label: Notifications
description.helpText: Receive email alerts when there is activity.

indeterminate.title: Indeterminate
indeterminate.desc: Useful for representing partial selection in lists with "select all".
indeterminate.label: Partial selection

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Semantic variants for the checked state.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes to match form density.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Disabled state preserving the visual value.

props.label: Visible label to the right of the control.
props.description: Secondary descriptive text below the label.
props.helperText: Helper text below the control. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that replaces helperText and applies an error state.
props.color: Semantic color applied in the checked state.
props.size: Size of the box and label.
props.indeterminate: Tri-state: shows a dash instead of the checkmark.
props.disabled: Disables the checkbox and prevents interaction.
props.readonly: Blocks changes but keeps focus and active styles.
props.required: Marks the field as required and shows an asterisk.
props.name: HTML name attribute for form submission.
props.value: HTML value attribute, useful inside a checkbox group.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the value changes (syncs v-model).
